title: Cold Chain Validation Programme
alt: Four stages of a cold chain validation programme

items.label: Risk-based strategy
items.desc: Start from stability data and labelled conditions; let ICH Q9 direct focus

items.label: Map & qualify storage
items.desc: Map controlled areas under worst-case loads; then IQ/OQ/PQ each unit

items.label: Validate transport lanes
items.desc: Validate by real lane and pack-out with summer and winter challenges

items.label: Monitor & revalidate
items.desc: Continuous logging, excursion control and revalidation on change
